subcodes.first_line: The mention of the eternal leaf upon the Tree of Paradise: O Concourse on High, hearken ye unto Me! This is from a remembrance that bestoweth upon all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ورقه البقا فی شجر الفردوس ان یا ملا الاعلی فاسمعون و هذا من ذکر یهب کل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for women, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
